text:
ジェットブーツを使うのは
初めてか？

ジェットブーツはテクニックと
PAが両方セットできる。

あとは状況に合わせて
支援にまわりながら、使えばいい。

そんなに難しくはないはずだ。
では、健闘を祈る
Is this the first time you've used Jet Boots?

What is important to know about Jet Boots is
you can set Techniques and Photon Arts at the
same time.

Use them to support operatives around you...
depending on the situation, of course.

It shouldn't be that difficult--I would hope
so, anyway. In any case, good luck out there.
